notes: Smoke builds temporary control CLI and daemon binaries.
Smoke uses a short /tmp/kanl3-* disposable data-home to avoid macOS AF_UNIX socket path length failures.
Smoke writes a disposable registry with agent-mod and agent-1, then follows delegate.new -> plugin delegate.ack -> plugin delegate.submit lifecycle order.
Plugin stream.tail event ids are compared against CLI stream before and after plugin writes.
Duplicate command_id returns the same event_id; conflicting duplicate via CLI exits non-zero with command_id conflict.
